betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Spark Laser Crystal§f focuses energy for §bICF systems§f and §bFEL§f amplification.

§eIn FEL:§f
Requires §b4.8 MHE/s§f - second highest power tier.

§eIn ICF:§f
Precision-grown crystals amplify laser output for fusion ignition.

§eCrafting:§f
Requires advanced materials including Spark components.

§aTip:§f A major stepping stone before Digamma crystals - powerful but significantly safer to produce.
